memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Swillington, Swillinton, Swilington, Swilinton, Swilton and many more. First found in Yorkshire where they were anciently seated as Lords of the Manor. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: the name represented in many forms and recorded from the mid 17th century in the great migration from Europe. Migrants settled in the eastern seaboard from Newfoundland, to Maine, to Virginia, the Carolinas, and to the islands. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009).

memoryArtifacts.headline: The north window of Stopham Church
memoryArtifacts.description:
The north window, consisting of two lights (of which, as well as of the church itself, we give engravings), repaired 1853, contains figures of the Stopham family. The arms in it are Barttelot, Stopham (very old ones), Lewknor, D'Oyley, Etchingham, Walton, Sykeston, and Camoys. The figures are
1.    A knight in armour, Brian, with Stopham arms below, and the Latin inscription :
Brian de Stopham, Miles, Filius et Haeres Radulfi, Militis, Floruit Temp. Johannis et Henrici R. Angl. et, Radulfo de Stopham mil. Filio et Haerede relicto, obiit Edw. I. Anno secundo. A.D. 1273.
2.    A kneeling figure of John Barttelot, with arms of Barttelot and Stopham.
3.    A kneeling figure of Stopham (Sir Ralph).
4.    Three figures of the three daughters of William de Stopham ; eldest, Joan, married John Barttelot, whose figure is also in the window, and his brass in the nave ; second, Isabella, married Robert Palmer; and third, Margaret, died unmarried. Mr. Turner ' makes William de Stopham to have had only two daughters.
The window was the work of one Roeland, a Flemish glass-stainer.

zh.Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Stopham III於1345年出生在英國素可斯托福哈姆時，他的父親John de Stopham Jr45歲，母親Isabella de St John63歲。他於大約1333年與Joanne    Atte Ford在英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年10月31日在英國素可安莫林享年33歲。

zh-hans.Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Stopham III于1345年出生在英国素可斯托福哈姆时，他的父亲John de Stopham Jr45岁，母亲Isabella de St John63岁。他于大约1333年与Joanne    Atte Ford在英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年10月31日在英国素可安莫林享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stopham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English Toppan, of uncertain meaning. The second element is perhaps Middle English pan(ne) ‘(crown of the) head’, while Top- could be derived from several different words. If from Middle English toppen ‘to shave (the head)’, then Toppan might have been a name for a barber who provided tonsures for the clergy. Alternatively, Top- might represent Middle English tup, top(pe) ‘ram, male sheep’, hence ‘ram-head’, or Middle English top(pe), Anglo-Norman French tupe ‘hair on the head, tuft of hair, forelock’, denoting someone with a distinctive head of hair.

variants.name: Topping
meanings: nickname from Middle English topping(e) ‘hair on the head’, probably given to someone with a distinctive head of hair or forelock. See also Topp and Topham .
perhaps from an unrecorded Old English personal name Topping, a pet form of Topp. See also Topp .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Stopham III was born in 1345, in Stopham, Sussex, England, his father, John de Stopham Jr, was 45 and his mother, Isabella de St John, was 63. He married Joanne    Atte Ford about 1333, in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 31 October 1378, in Angmering, Sussex, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Stopham III est né en 1345, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Stopham Jr, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabella de St John, avait 63 ans. Il a épousé Joanne    Atte Ford environ 1333, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 31 octobre 1378, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Stopham III 1345 in Stopham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Stopham Jr 45 und seine Mutter Isabella de St John 63. Er hat um 1333 in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Joanne    Atte Ford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Oktober 1378 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Angmering, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stopham III è nato il nel 1345 nel Stopham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Stopham Jr, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de St John, aveva 63 anni. Lui sposato Joanne    Atte Ford circa 1333, nel Stopham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1378, nel Angmering, Sussex, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Stopham IIIが1345年にイギリススセックスストファムで生まれた時，父John de Stopham Jrは45歳，母Isabella de St Johnは63歳であった。約1333年にイギリスイギリススセックスストファムでJoanne    Atte Fordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年10月31日にイギリススセックスアングメリングで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Stopham III(이)가 1345년 영국 수세스 스토프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Stopham Jr(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de St John(은)는 63세였다. 그는 대략 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스토프아에서 Joanne    Atte Ford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 10월 31일 영국 수세스 앤그머잉에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stopham III nasceu em 1345, em Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Stopham Jr, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de St John, tinha 63 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne    Atte Ford aproximadamente 1333, em Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1378, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Stopham III родился в 1345 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Stopham Jr было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de St John, 63. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne    Atte Ford около 1333 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 31 октября 1378 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Stopham III nació en 1345, en Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Stopham Jr, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabella de St John, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Joanne    Atte Ford aproximadamente 1333, en Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1378, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
